response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS W MULTIPLIED BY (0.98) RAISED TO THE POWER OF N. TO ACHIEVE A 25 PERCENT REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE THE MINIMUM NUMBER OF ITEMS NEEDED IS 14. CHECK THE CLOCK BEFORE YOU START. LOOK AT THE CLOCK AGAIN DURING THE RIDE. VERIFY THE CLOCK ONCE MORE AT THE FINISH LINE.
